expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((`File Name` IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(`File Name`)) = 0)) THEN CAST((CONCAT('Store_Inventory_ ', CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS STRING))) AS STRING) ELSE `File Name` END) AS STRING)
